description: A business that creates, curates, packages, or distributes information or media for a specific audience.
best_for: Users with writing, editing, curation, or media production ability
Users who can consistently identify useful topics for a niche audience
Users who can build trust through repeated output
bad_for: Users who want immediate revenue without audience building
Users who cannot maintain a content cadence at all
mvp_examples: A short series for one specific user problem
evaluation_points: Is the niche narrow enough to be memorable?
Does the audience already care deeply about this topic?
Is there a realistic path from attention to monetization?
starter_next_steps: List recurring questions that audience asks
